text.title: Minimum Product Frameworks Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree on observable signals to apply / skip / route-elsewhere. Each leaf references a rule id from 01-core-rules.xml.

decision-tree.root-question: DR for this product exists and is <=90 days old?

conclusion.verdict: re-pick is premature; honour existing DR until trigger fires

branch.question: Product is new OR in pivot moment?

conclusion.verdict: iterating stable product; framework choice is moot
score all 9; author DR with proof gate + triggers
